title: Diagnostics, Build Reports, Metrics, Profiles, and Failure Triage · Program Brief: Diagnostic Policy
summary: The command prints unordered warnings without locations, hides skipped pages, reports only total duration, logs author content and local paths, and cannot compare a slow build with a prior release. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the diagnostic policy increment in bounded actionable build and publication evidence report. Learners progress throu…
objectives: Sort deterministically, deduplicate, cap cascades, promote configured warnings, summarize omissions, and return status from policy.
Represent severity, stable code, source span, stage, message, safe context, cause, suggestion, and ownership separately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: ssg-diagnostic-policy — Sort deterministically, deduplicate, cap cascades, promote configured warnings, summarize omissions, and return status from policy.
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-diagnostics-observability-4
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-diagnostics-observability-4.
# Case 1655: an accessibility-led community newsroom release.
# Operating constraint: reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval.
# Changed case: delete a source and change a shared layout, then compare incremental and clean artifact digests.
def worked_static_site_diagnostics_observability_4(diagnostics: int = 7, located: int = 7, build_stages: int = 10, measured_stages: int = 10, unredacted_secrets: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "readerworked4",
        "source1655",
        "parse4dekrow",
        "routeworked41655",
        "artifact1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if diagnostics < 0 or located < 0:
        return False, located, "diagnostic-count"
    if located != diagnostics:
        return False, located, "location-coverage"
    if build_stages < 1 or measured_stages != build_stages:
        return False, measured_stages, "metric-coverage"
    if unredacted_secrets > 0:
        return False, unredacted_secrets, "diagnostic-leak"
    assert located == diagnostics
    return True, measured_stages, "actionable-build-report"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Sort deterministically, deduplicate, cap cascades, promote configured warnings, summarize omissions, and return status from policy.
